title: द्वादश ज्योतिर्लिंग स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री द्वादश ज्योतिर्लिंग स्तोत्रम् ॥

सौराष्ट्रे सोमनाथं च श्रीशैले मल्लिकार्जुनम्।
उज्जयिन्यां महाकालमोंकारममलेश्वरम्॥ १॥

परल्यां वैद्यनाथं च डाकिन्यां भीमशंकरम्।
सेतुबन्धे तु रामेशं नागेशं दारुकावने॥ २॥

वाराणस्यां तु विश्वेशं त्र्यम्बकं गौतमीतटे।
हिमालये तु केदारं घुश्मेशं च शिवालये॥ ३॥

एतानि ज्योतिर्लिंगानि सायं प्रातः पठेन्नरः।
सप्तजन्मकृतं पापं स्मरणेन विनश्यति॥ ४॥

॥ इति श्री द्वादश ज्योतिर्लिंग स्तोत्रम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
benefits: Sacred Dwadasha Jyotirlinga Stotram for devotion and spiritual growth
Invokes blessings of Shiva in all forms
Traditionally recited for removal of sins and bestows spiritual merit
Ideal for Shiva festivals and daily worship
description: Dedicated to Lord Shiva, the Dwadasha Jyotirlinga Stotram (द्वादश ज्योतिर्लिंग स्तोत्रम्) is a devotional hymn of praise revered in Hindu tradition. Rooted in Shiva Purana, this composition carries deep spiritual significance. Chanting this stotra with devotion is said to grant divine protection and auspiciousness as well as remove sins and bestow spiritual merit. Additionally, it is known to invoke blessings of Shiva in all forms. Recitation is particularly auspicious on Monday (Somvar) and during Maha Shivaratri. Comprising 4 verses, it can be completed in approximately 2 minutes, making it suitable for daily devotional practice. On this page, you can read the complete Dwadasha Jyotirlinga Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Dwadasha Jyotirlinga Stotram in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Sacred hymn for Shiva devotion.
